pr.title: fix: remove stale English refs and Ollama mentions
pr.body: ## Summary Deep audit found 3 stale references missed in PR #4: 1. **`agents/prompt-engineer.md:193`** — `` `/refine` `` changed to `` `/raffina` `` 2. **`commands/aiuto.md:114`** — Privacy strict mode removed "via Ollama" (ollama MCP was removed in v1.0.2) 3. **`skills/privacy-routing/SKILL.md:68`** — Removed "(Ollama o equivalente)" from PRIVILEGIATO level Also bumps version to **1.0.3** per CONTRIBUTING.md PATCH requirement for documentation updates. ## Review & Testing Checklist for Human - [ ] Verify `/bettercallclaude-italia:aiuto` shows correct privacy modes without Ollama reference - [ ] Verify version 1.0.3 is shown in `/bettercallclaude-italia:versione` ### Notes - Version bumped to 1.0.3 in all 4 manifest files + versione.md + README badge (per Devin Review feedback) Link to Devin session: https://app.devin.ai/sessions/03c43027ab5542f2b3a49e3016f02543 Requested by: @fedec65 ---
pr.author: devin-ai-integration[bot]
